# SEO AI Audit

> Free, anonymous tool: paste any article URL and get an AI-search readiness
> audit back. No account, no signup, nothing stored server-side.

## What it does

Audits a single web page across four lenses and returns 0-100 scores plus
evidence-backed findings:

- AEO (Answer Engine Optimization) — does the page lead with a
  self-contained answer an AI assistant can lift verbatim?
- GEO (Generative Engine Optimization) — structure, headings, and semantic
  markup that make the page easy for a model to parse.
- Citability — stat density, checkable sources, and quotable sentences an
  AI Overview can cite by name.
- AI Overview readiness — the specific blockers stopping this page from
  being pulled into a generated answer.

## Routes

- `/` — landing page with the URL input; start here.
- `/audit?url=<encoded-url>` — results page for a given URL. Stateless:
  reopening this URL re-runs the audit rather than loading a saved report.

## How to use

POST the target URL to run an audit; results stream back as they complete.
There is no API key, no rate-limit tier, and no persisted history — every
request is a fresh, one-shot analysis of the single URL supplied.
